## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm qg:changed` (or stricter equivalent) was run locally
- [ ] Relevant tests were added/updated when applicable

## AI Review

- [ ] Codex review requested (`@codex review`) or automatic Codex reviews are enabled
